scripts.test: node tests/server.test.cjs && node tests/analytics.test.cjs && node tests/mcp-commands.test.cjs && if command -v unity-editor >/dev/null 2>&1; then unity-editor -batchmode -nographics -runTests -projectPath "TBD SpaceGame/TBD SpaceGame" -testResults UnityTestResults.xml; else echo 'unity-editor not found, skipping Unity tests'; fi
